back_flavor: The quad is the central crossroads of Miskatonic University.
name: Miskatonic Quad
text: [fast] During your turn, if there are exactly 1 or 2 investigators in the game: Move to a connecting location. (Group limit once per round.)

back_flavor: Recently renovated, the dormitories boast some of the best modern conveniences, including air conditioning, flush toilets, and a communal ice box.
flavor: There's never a dull moment in the university dorms.
name: Dormitories
text: [action]: Heal 1 damage and 1 horror. (Limit once per game.)

back_flavor: The construction of the West Memorial Science Hall at the northern end of campus is confusing, to say the least. However, students nevertheless are more than happy for the modern facilities and state-of-the-art science equipment.
flavor: The students are never exactly sure what will be under the microscope each day.
name: Science Hall
text: Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues at Science Hall: Choose and discard 1 card from your hand.

back_flavor: A generous grant from Tillinghast Endeavors has allowed the university to bring the storied observatory back, bigger and better than ever.
flavor: To date, Miskatonic astronomers have identified at least 15 separate stars that appear to have gone missing from the Northern Hemisphere.
name: Warren Observatory
text: [reaction] After you discover 1 or more clues at this location: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per round.)

back_flavor: To take every precaution since the flood, the Orne librarians have cleared out the basement archives and worked to waterproof the building.
flavor: Students have reported strange sounds coming from the empty archives at night...
name: Orne Library
text: [action][action]: Draw 3 cards. (Limit once per game.)

name: Extraplanar Visions
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] or [intellect] (X), where X is the number of cards in your hand. If you fail, take 1 damage and discard 1 card at random from your hand.

flavor: "God help the dreamer whose mad visions shew Those did eyes set in crystal gulfs below!" -H.P. Lovecraft, "Fungi from Yuggoth"
name: Wild Compulsion
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must either discard 1 card at random from your hand, or lose 1 resource.

name: Mutated!
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +2 difficulty if there is an enemy at your location. If you fail, you must either take 2 damage, or each investigator at your location takes 1 horror.

name: Mutated Experiment
text: Forced - When this enemy is defeated: Each investigator at its location takes 1 horror.

name: David Renfield
text: Aloof. (This enemy does not automatically engage investigators at its location.) [reaction] After you successfully investigate David Renfield's location: ([codex] 1).

name: Cornelia Akely
text: Alert. (After you fail a skill test while evading this enemy, it attacks you.) [reaction] After you successfully evade Cornelia Akely: Ready her. ([codex] 2).

name: Naomi O'Bannion
text: Retaliate. (After you fail a skill test while fighting this enemy, it attacks you.) [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] resources: Parley. ([codex] 3).

name: Sgt. Earl Monroe
text: Elusive. (After this enemy attacks or is attacked while it is ready, it moves to a connecting location with no investigators and exhausts.) [action]: Parley. Test [combat] (4). Decrease the difficulty for this test by 1 for each damage on Sgt. Earl Monroe. If you succeed, ([codex] 4).

name: Abigail Foreman
text: Aloof. (This enemy does not automatically engage investigators at its location.) [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (X), where X is the number of clues on Abigail Foreman's location. If you succeed, place 1 clue (from the token pool) on Abigail Foreman's location. ([codex] 5).

name: Margaret Liu
text: Aloof. (This enemy does not automatically engage investigators at its location.) [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more at Margaret Liu's location: ([codex] 6).

flavor: You've never seen something rust so quickly.
name: Unnatural Decay
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, you must either place 1 doom on an asset you control, or take 2 damage.

flavor: "The removal of the slab revealed a black aperture, from which rushed an effluence of miasmal gases so nauseous that we started back in horror." -H.P. Lovecraft, "The Statement of Randolph Carter"
name: Putrid Vapors
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, take 1 horror and discard a non-story asset you control.

name: Langour
text: Revelation - Put Languor into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. Forced - After your turn begins: Discard the top card of your deck. If it is a weakness, draw it. Otherwise, you cannot play or commit cards of that type (asset, event, or skill) this round. [action][action]: Discard Languor.

name: Dissonance
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, lose 1 action and choose a cardtype (asset, event, or skill). Discard all non-weakness cards of the chosen type from your hand.

name: Torment
text: Peril. Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, name a cardtype (asset, event, or skill). Each investigator discards 1 card of the named type from their hand.

flavor: "It is vowed that the birds are psychopomps lying in wait for the souls of the dying..." -H.P. Lovecraft, "The Dunwich Horror"
name: Whippoorwill
text:
Aloof. Hunter.
Each investigator at Whippoorwill's location gets -1 [willpower], -1 [intellect], -1 [combat], and -1 [agility].

flavor: "If they can catch the fleeing soul when it leaves the body, they instantly flutter away chittering in daemonic laughter." -H.P. Lovecraft, "The Dunwich Horror"
name: Eager for Death
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). Increase this skill test's difficulty by 1 for each damage on you. If you fail, take 2 horror.

back_flavor: If you go in, you might never come out.
back_text: Sewer Culvert is connected to each Sewer Tunnels location, and vice versa.
name: Sewer Culvert
text: Sewer Culvert is connected to each Sewer Tunnels location, and vice versa. [action]: Resign. "I can't take it any more!" You flee the sewers.

back_flavor: A fetid, putrescent stench fills the labyrinthine network of tunnels beneath the city.
flavor: Whatever is here is worse than rats.
name: Sewer Tunnels
text: Forced - After you enter this location: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded and draw it.

back_flavor: A fetid, putrescent stench fills the labyrinthine network of tunnels beneath the city.
flavor: Gnarled roots have reclaimed the network of tunnels, making them difficult to navigate.
name: Sewer Tunnels
text: Forced - After you enter this location: Lose 1 action.

back_flavor: A fetid, putrescent stench fills the labyrinthine network of tunnels beneath the city.
flavor: Whatever tore through the wall sure wasn't trying to get into the crypt.
name: Sewer Tunnels
text: Forced - When you end your turn at this location: Take 1 horror.

back_flavor: A fetid, putrescent stench fills the labyrinthine network of tunnels beneath the city.
flavor: Judging by the quality of the hooch and contraband, this stash was put here by the Sheldon gang. You can help yourself, so long as they don't find out.
name: Sewer Tunnels
text: [reaction] When you end your turn at this location: Gain 1 resource.

back_flavor: A fetid, putrescent stench fills the labyrinthine network of tunnels beneath the city.
flavor: What is that floating just beneath the surface?
name: Sewer Tunnels
text: Forced - When you end your turn at this location: Choose and discard 1 card from your hand.
